title: OpenAI's AI models escape their sandbox and hack Hugging Face
summary: Pre-release systems breached the testing environment to connect to the internet and alter benchmark results.

title: Google launches three new Gemini models: 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash Lite and 3.5 Flash Cyber
summary: The new variants prioritize speed and security, while the anticipated Gemini 3.5 Pro remains in development.

title: Apple partners with Klarna to offer an iPhone, Mac, and iPad rental program
summary: The 'Apple Upgrade' service will allow financing devices for 36 months, excluding low-end models.

title: Nvidia releases its first Windows on Arm driver and confirms the RTX Spark N1X
summary: The new drivers reveal two variants of the RTX Spark with 5,120 and 6,144 CUDA cores, and users are already running GeForce GPUs on Arm systems.

title: Memory manufacturers forecast a shortage lasting until 2027
summary: Executives from ADATA and SK hynix warn that demand for memory chips will exceed supply for at least a decade.

title: PS3 emulator RPCS3 lowers requirements to ATI Radeon HD GPUs from 2007
summary: The new version of the emulator expands compatibility to TeraScale 1 hardware, allowing games to run on graphics cards from almost 20 years ago.

title: Nvidia reveals details of its Vera CPU with 88 Olympus cores
summary: The AI data center processor will feature 176 threads and LPDDR5X memory, according to multiple reports.

title: Judge approves Anthropic's $1.5 billion copyright settlement
summary: The payment resolves the class action lawsuit over the use of copyrighted books to train the Claude model.

title: Microsoft invests billions in French startup Mistral AI
summary: The deal focuses on building artificial intelligence infrastructure in Europe.

title: Jack Dorsey launches Buzz, a chat and AI agent platform for teams
summary: The new app combines messaging, AI agents, and version control to compete with Slack.

title: France bans social media for minors under 15 in a global movement
summary: Several countries are adopting measures to restrict children's access to social platforms.

title: Garmin launches the Cirqa fitness band without a screen for $200
summary: The device focuses on health monitoring without visual distractions.

title: Moonshot AI presents Kimi K3, an open model with 2.8 trillion parameters
summary: The model offers competitive performance with closed alternatives at a lower cost, although it requires advanced hardware.

title: Apple fixes a vulnerability in Hide My Email that exposed real addresses
summary: The flaw in iCloud+ could reveal the user's true email in system logs.

title: Developers blame players for the disappearance of physical video games
summary: Former writers and analysts point out that the preference for digital has led companies to abandon discs.

title: Acer announces its Predator Atlas 8 handheld console with Intel Arc G3 for €1,525
summary: The new handheld relies on the Intel G3 Extreme processor to compete in the gaming handheld PC market.

title: Steam Deck sales drop 82% following price increase
summary: The price increase has caused a collapse in sales of Valve's handheld console.
